headings.strategy: Technical Sans for authority and clarity.

body.strategy: Monospaced for data alignment, financial figures, and terminal density.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Dense, data-heavy, grid borders strategy.
spacing_and_layout.grid_structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-800

components.buttons: rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-widest bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-colors border border-zinc-700
components.cards: rounded-none border border-zinc-800 bg-[#0c0c0e] flex flex-col
components.inputs: rounded-none border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0
components.badges: rounded-sm px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-widest border

images.description: Stock market abstract background for the initial search/landing page before data is loaded.
Dark market texture to add depth to sidebars or empty states.

motion.strategy: Instantaneous and functional. Avoid bouncy or slow animations. Everything must feel immediate like a real-time terminal.

icons.strategy: Use sparingly. Prefer text-based labels and tabular data over icons. When needed, keep them at 16px size.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, representing the role. E.g., data-testid='stock-search-input'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Adopt a 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic. Maximize data density by minimizing white space.
Use grid borders: wrap a container with bg-zinc-800 and gap-px, and let the children have bg-zinc-950 to create 1px crisp borders everywhere.
DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or standard sans. You MUST use 'IBM Plex Sans' for UI and 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers and data cells.
Use tabular-nums class for all data outputs.
Remove heavy shadows and massive border radii. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm.
Always apply data-testid attributes to key interactive elements.
Display all 9 requested categories in a tight dashboard layout, prioritizing the main chart, stock-specifics, and AI verdict.
Use Recharts with sharp line configurations (not curveMonotone) for the stock charts. Color them based on positive/negative trend.
